target_selection_rule: Select the reachable frontier cluster anchor with the lowest known-free BFS cost; fall back to raw frontier cells from the cumulative belief frontier cache.
fallback_rule: When no reachable frontier exists, choose the legal action with the largest belief-only expected immediate information gain.
tie_break_rule: target_distance_or_gain, recent_trajectory_revisit, visit_count, fixed action order (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW)
